{{CargoRelic
|name=Wet Gardener Poster
|class_id=22013
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=06-04
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Jun 4, 1895 AD, the poster for The Wet Gardener was posted on the cinema wall.<br>The poster came along with the first film in the world the Wet Gardener. The film was about a gardener who was watering the garden and got soaking wet after a little boy pulled a prank on him. He then started to chase the little boy and gave him a good beating. As one of the earliest films, the plot was simple and plain, but it undoubtedly laid a foundation for future cinema art.
|fame=46
|art=25
|fth=24
|civ=28
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +1<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss2=Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +2<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss3=Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +3<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss4=Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +5<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100
|ss7=Per 2 FAME Master Scrolls used, Snail DEF +5<br>FAME Master Scrolls Used: 100/100<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill I.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Water DMG +10
}}
